detail.title: Is Unique LCCI
detail.content:
Implement an algorithm to determine if a string has all unique characters. What if you cannot use additional data structures?

Example 1:

Input: s = "leetcode"
Output: false

Example 2:

Input: s = "abc"
Output: true

 

Note:

  • 0 <= len(s) <= 100

codeSnippets.code:
class Solution:
    def isUnique(self, astr: str) -> bool:

hints: 你能用O(NlogN)的时间复杂度解决它吗？这样的解法会是什么样呢？
